articles.title: Terra Classic Price Keeps Pumping Higher - LUNC up 80%
articles.description: Terra Classic (LUNC) appears to be making a comeback following its apparent collapse in early May 2022. One of the year's most impressive comebacks is taking shape around the token. LUNC has increased by 37,000% ever since it gained its bottom following the Terra collapse. The 1.2% token burn tax on all transactions significantly contributes to this exponential growth. This project is...

articles.title: Helium Price Benefits From Solana Migration Plans - Where Next for HNT?
articles.description: Helium crypto is trading 14% higher today as enthusiasm for its proposed migration to the Solana blockchain picks up steam. Currently priced at $4.92 on CoinGecko, HNT has seen trading volumes surge 164% to $182 million in the past 24 hours. articles.title: An Ethereum Core Dev Saved Avalanche From $24B Network “Insta-Death”
articles.description: A malicious actor could have taken down the entire Avalanche network for less than $200,000. A since-patched vulnerability with the power to take down the Avalanche blockchain has been revealed.Ethereum core developer Pter Szilgyi released an Avalanche Vulnerability report Thursday, detailing a critical bug he found in the Avalanche network code earlier this year. articles.title: BNB Chain announces zero-knowledge proof scaling technology

articles.title: Aave devs look set to receive $16.3M via retroactive funding
articles.description: A proposal to reward members of the Aave Companies with $16.28 million in retroactive funding for the development of v3 of the Aave Protocol looks set to pass.
